title: Mobile Card View not sorting
excerpt:
The mobile card view is not sorting the items correctly despite setting them to be sorted by date via the desktop browser. 
Hope this can be fixed soon as our field guys prefer the Card View and its important foe them to…

posts.author: nethelper (hong)
posts.cookedHtml:
The mobile card view is not sorting the items correctly despite setting them to be sorted by date via the desktop browser.

Hope this can be fixed soon as our field guys prefer the Card View and its important foe them to be sorted via date/time.
